expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: The run explicitly covers SKILL.md/README.md/reference.md, but cannot cover AGENTS docs because they were not provided. execution_notes.md: "Benchmark focus coverage: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md; AGENTS docs noted but not available." result.md: "AGENTS docs (not provided in evidence bundle)" and "AGENTS docs alignment cannot be validated with the provided evidence." Therefore the full case focus (including AGENTS docs alignment) is not explicitly covered end-to-end.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: A doc-sync mismatch is identified between README.md and the primary contract docs (SKILL.md/reference.md). execution_notes.md: "One doc-sync mismatch found: README.md claims developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md is produced; SKILL.md/reference.md Phase 7 outputs do not mention it." result.md reiterates: "README.md claims ... developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md ... In the provided SKILL.md Phase 7 output list and reference.md Phase 7 artifact families, developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md is not listed." This means outputs are not fully aligned with the primary phase docs.
